strengths: Long polyglot engineering track record across web, mobile, and embedded
Founder of open-source GIS platform shows entrepreneurial initiative
Workshops and talks demonstrate ability to share insights externally
concerns: No demonstrated AI/ML expertise or AI products built at scale
Career level is Senior/Staff, not Principal/Director IC with 15 years of strategic leadership
No evidence of cloud platform strategy or advising strategic customers

key_factors.factor: Lack of AI expertise and AI-built products
Seniority gap vs Principal/Director IC role

response.justification: The candidate is a capable, versatile senior engineer with strong craftsmanship, open-source founding experience, and a history of teaching and speaking. However, the role requires Principal/Director-level IC stature with deep AI expertise, cloud platform strategy, and a record of advising strategic customers — none of which are evidenced. AI exposure is limited to recent MCP tooling work, well short of the recognized AI expertise sought.
